workflow.name: On Browser Home Page
workflow.description: Start the process from a fresh browser tab.
triggers: If the current URL is chrome://new-tab-page/

workflow.name: On Example.com
workflow.description: Confirm navigation to example.com was successful.
triggers: If the current URL is https://example.com/

sentence: go to en.wikipedia.org, search for Bezier curve, and open the article

workflow.name: On Browser Home Page
workflow.description: Start the process from a fresh browser tab.
triggers: If the current URL is chrome://new-tab-page/

workflow.name: On Wikipedia Homepage
workflow.description: Search for a specific topic on Wikipedia.
triggers: If the current URL contains en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Main_Page
If a search box with placeholder 'Search Wikipedia' is visible
actions: Type 'Bezier curve' into the search box with placeholder 'Search Wikipedia'

workflow.name: On Search Results Or Article Page
workflow.description: Confirm the search navigated to the Bezier curve article page, or click the link if on a search results page.
triggers: If the current URL contains en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Bezier_curve
If the current URL contains en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Special:Search
actions: If the current URL contains en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Special:Search, click the link with text 'Bezier curve'

workflow.name: On Bezier Curve Article Page
workflow.description: The target article is open, confirming successful navigation.
triggers: If the current URL contains en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Bezier_curve
If the page title contains 'Bezier curve - Wikipedia'
actions: Terminate: The 'Bezier curve' article is open.

sentence: go to the-internet.herokuapp.com/login and log in with username tomsmith and password SuperSecretPassword!

workflow.name: On Browser Home Page
workflow.description: Start the process from a fresh browser tab.
triggers: If the current URL is chrome://new-tab-page/

workflow.name: On Login Page
workflow.description: Enter the provided username and password into the login form.
triggers: If the current URL contains the-internet.herokuapp.com/login
If an input field with id 'username' is visible
If an input field with id 'password' is visible
actions: Type 'tomsmith' into the input field with id 'username'
Type 'SuperSecretPassword!' into the input field with id 'password'

workflow.name: On Secure Area Page
workflow.description: Verify that the login was successful and the user is on the secure area page.
triggers: If the current URL contains the-internet.herokuapp.com/secure
If a div with class 'flash success' contains text 'You logged into a secure area!'

sentence: go to the-internet.herokuapp.com/dynamic_loading/2, click Start, and wait for the hidden text to appear

workflow.name: On Browser Home Page
workflow.description: Start the process from a fresh browser tab.
triggers: If the current URL is chrome://new-tab-page/

workflow.name: On Dynamic Loading Page
workflow.description: Click the 'Start' button to initiate the loading process.
triggers: If the current URL contains the-internet.herokuapp.com/dynamic_loading/2
If a button with text 'Start' is visible

workflow.name: Waiting for Hidden Text
workflow.description: Waiting for the hidden text to appear after clicking 'Start'.
triggers: If the current URL contains the-internet.herokuapp.com/dynamic_loading/2
If a div with id 'loading' is visible

workflow.name: Hidden Text Appeared
workflow.description: The hidden text has appeared, indicating the task is complete.
triggers: If the current URL contains the-internet.herokuapp.com/dynamic_loading/2
If a div with id 'finish' is visible
actions: Terminate: task complete, hidden text appeared

issues.message: Empty actions with a wait/verification-sounding name -- looks like an intentional 'sit here until something external changes' state. Confirm that's what you meant.

sentence: go to the-internet.herokuapp.com/checkboxes and make sure both checkboxes are checked

workflow.name: On Browser Home Page
workflow.description: Start the process from a fresh browser tab.
triggers: If the current URL is chrome://new-tab-page/

workflow.name: On Checkboxes Page - Ensure Checked
workflow.description: Identify the checkboxes and click any that are not checked.
triggers: If the current URL contains the-internet.herokuapp.com/checkboxes
If a heading with text 'Checkboxes' is visible
actions: If checkbox 1 is not checked, click checkbox 1
If checkbox 2 is not checked, click checkbox 2

workflow.name: Both Checkboxes Confirmed Checked
workflow.description: Verify that both checkboxes are now in a checked state.
triggers: If the current URL contains the-internet.herokuapp.com/checkboxes
If checkbox 1 is checked
If checkbox 2 is checked
actions: Terminate: Both checkboxes are now checked
